name: deeplens
description: Deep code analysis and documentation generator powered by Claude Agent SDK

scripts.pkg:macos-arm64: node scripts/prefetch-pkg-node.js --target node22-macos-arm64 && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output src-tauri/binaries/deeplens-sidecar-aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.pkg:macos-x64: node scripts/prefetch-pkg-node.js --target node22-macos-x64 && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node22-macos-x64 --output src-tauri/binaries/deeplens-sidecar-x86_64-apple-darwin
scripts.pkg:linux-x64: node scripts/prefetch-pkg-node.js --target node22-linux-x64 && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node22-linux-x64 --output src-tauri/binaries/deeplens-sidecar-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.pkg:win-x64: node scripts/prefetch-pkg-node.js --target node22-win-x64 && pkg dist/bundle.cjs --targets node22-win-x64 --output src-tauri/binaries/deeplens-sidecar-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe
